response.justification: Despite a broad and diverse engineering background, the candidate lacks demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin JVM tooling, enterprise frameworks like Spring or Hibernate, and IDE internals — all core requirements for this role. Their recent work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of contributing to enterprise IDEs, build tool integrations, or JVM-based language tooling.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source tooling and developer-focused projects
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No visible experience with Java/Kotlin IDE tooling or JVM internals
Lacks demonstrable work with Spring, Quarkus, or application server integration
Recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js, not enterprise Java/Kotlin ecosystems
